herbs.herb_desc: Aesculus hippocastanum, also known as horse chestnut, is a key ingredient in various skincare products, including lotions. The extracts from this plant have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. When used in a lotion, aesculus hippocastanum can aid in reducing the appearance of swelling and discoloration, promoting healthier-looking skin.
